CREATE TABLE points (id UInt32, vector Tuple(Float64, Float64));
SELECT LpDistance(vector, (3, 4), 2) FROM points WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, LpDistance(vector, (0, 0), 2) FROM points WHERE id IN (2, 3);
SELECT LpDistance((x, y), (5, 5), 3) FROM (SELECT vector.1 AS x, vector.2 AS y FROM points);
SELECT LpDistance((2, 2), (3, 3), p) FROM (SELECT 3 AS p);
SELECT id, LpDistance((vector.1, vector.2), (1, 1), 2) AS distance FROM points HAVING distance < 5;
